emails.subject: paralegal "thanks"
emails.body: paralegal "thanks" Do you think that we should give Susan B., Susan F. and Tana an expression of thanks for their work during Marie's departure? I was thinking that a gift certificate would be appropriate (e.g., spa services, Enron gift products, etc.) and it might send the message that we do know and appreciate their efforts. Sara
